meta.title: BabyTalk - AI Baby Cry Analyzer
meta.description: Understand your baby's needs with AI-powered cry analysis using MFCC + CNN deep learning

hero.heading: Understand Your Baby's Cry
hero.description: Record your baby's cry and our AI will analyze it using deep learning to help identify what your baby needs.

features.edgeAiDesc: All analysis runs on your device
features.offlineDesc: No internet needed after first load

recorder.permission: Please allow microphone access to use this feature.
recorder.error: Error accessing microphone. Please check permissions.

results.title: Analysis Result
results.disclaimer: This is an AI-based estimation for reference only. Always consult your pediatrician for medical concerns.

hungry.label: Hungry
hungry.tip: Your baby might be hungry. Try offering a feeding.

discomfort.label: Uncomfortable
discomfort.tip: Check for wet diaper, uncomfortable clothing, temperature issues, or try gentle tummy massage.

fussy.label: Fussy / Tired
fussy.tip: Your baby may be tired or needs soothing. Try creating a calm environment, gentle rocking, or patting their back.

no_cry.label: No Crying Detected
no_cry.tip: Your baby seems calm! No crying was detected in the recording.

footer.disclaimer: Always consult your pediatrician for medical concerns.
